## How We Help
You type what you need, we help you get it done.
## Post a Request
Posting a Request captures your goal so we can build a plan and connect you with investors, advisors, co-founders, talent, and experts.
[Let's do this](https://www.startups.com/requests/start)
## What do you want to accomplish?
Raise Funding
Get Customers
Build Product
Find a Co-Founder
Find Advisors
Hire Talent
## Requests = Personalized Roadmap
Your Request creates a Personalized Roadmap that provides step-by-step guidance to complete your goal.
"Based on your Request, we're going to connect you with early stage investors, review your pitch deck, and walk you through the steps to close your funding round."
## Connect to People
Your Request is instantly matched to the right people using our AI-driven rankings, so you don't waste time on bad fits.
##  Good news! We have 1,452 potential matches for you.

## Real Expert Advisory
Our startup advisors help you answer tough questions and identify what to focus on next through 1:1 sessions, workshops, or direct messages.
![Presentation Slide](https://www.startups.com/assets/graphics/investor-match/pdr-pre-seed-travel.webp)
![Presentation Slide](https://www.startups.com/assets/graphics/investor-match/pdr-cpg-health.webp)
![Presentation Slide](https://www.startups.com/assets/graphics/investor-match/pdr-solar-power.webp)
## Customized Education
We give you a step-by-step task list and targeted tools and content to help you complete your Request.
## Next Steps
View Completed
## Upload Pitch Deck for Analysis
Get feedback on clarity, story, and gaps that may slow investor interest.
## Schedule 1:1 Review with Pitch Deck Expert
Pressure-test your deck with an experienced founder and refine key slides.
## Review Investor Matches to Contact
Focus on high-fit investors who align with your stage and goals.
## Draft Investor Outreach Emails
Craft concise messages that highlight traction and spark responses.
## One goal. One roadmap.  
Three clear paths to execution.
[Build My Roadmap](https://www.startups.com/requests/start)
## Join Over 1 Million Startups on our Platform

## 96% Positive
Founder Satisfaction Rating
My Advisor listened to my problem, explored different solutions, and then provided different opportunities for further exploration. I would highly recommend this session.
James Wilson
Co-Founder, ReUser
Launchrock
## ThredUp
Total Raised
$505,000,000
Startup Therapy Podcast
Great Startup Advice
I feel like a Startup Expert and it comes in handy with my consultancy work after listening to every podcast on their channel. These two Co-Founders have not only great startup advice but the psychology of Startups is very deep. I have only noticed a few problems which could be improved: some vulgar language, an overemphasis on founders groups which isn’t free or inexpensive (not all that effective if you can’t get the majority of the founders into groups), and I don’t care for after talk with listeners which was introduced a little here and there after the first 140+ episodes (this seems to just run on the amount of time of a typical easy-to-handle podcast).
Read More
@ScottSorgent
![](https://www.startups.com/assets/icons/socialproof/id-card.svg)
## 1,325,000
Registered Users
As a founder, sh!t gets overwhelming and oftentimes lonely. As you reach more and more success, it gets harder and harder to find a support group, someone to help you see wider, bigger. Having an expert advisor that knows what you're experiencing and has been through this before is incredibly helpful. It's completely invaluable and it's hard to put a price tag on it.
Christina Perla
Founder, MakeLab

Finally - someone who gets it and isn't afraid to put it on wax!
A friend recommended this to me, and I should probably send him an edible arrangement for it. The best podcast I've come across in a long time! And you knew it was going to be something special just by looking at the titles of the episodes. And man do they come through. Get some emotional and mental relief that you're not alone in this entrepreneurial journey. I binge listened to their podcast over 2 months (now I'm caught up) - and it's changed my trajectory for the better. I'm really grateful.
